title: myrsine australis
intro: Myrsine australis, also known as the New Zealand matagouri or matagouri, is a shrub native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myrsine australis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Myrsine australis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
